product.name: CremaNova Pro
product.tagline: Barista-level espresso at home, every morning.
features: Integrated conical burr grinder (30 grind settings)
15-bar Italian pump and PID temperature control
Auto milk frothing with microfoam presets

benefits: Launch bundle: two double-wall cups + cleaning kit
offer.scarcity: Only 2.500 units available for the launch.

audience.primary: 25–45 urban coffee lovers, renters and young homeowners, Italy-based

goals: Drive awareness and consideration for CremaNova Pro
Convert launch interest into store visits and online pre-orders
Highlight hero features and premium-yet-accessible positioning
messaging_priorities: Premium taste and consistency at home
Launch offer (price difference and limited units)
Local, city-specific flavor for Rome and Naples

rome.energy: Street-smart, direct, quick-witted; morning hustle to late-afternoon pick-me-up
rome.in_store: Flagship Rome store offers the barista class on Saturdays

naples.energy: Warm, musical, sun-soaked; family and friends, lively kitchen vibes
naples.in_store: Naples store offers the barista class on Sundays

include: One price point using Italian formatting (e.g., €1.099,90)
copy_constraints.tone: Warm, expressive, human; embrace fillers and lively reactions
